_meta.notes: Rules that map per-fund metrics to a Signal label (Strength / Weakness / Forming / Neutral). Tightened sell rule (any-of three triggers) is the post-mortem fix for the Taiwan / China A / Glb Clmt Chg false-positive pattern.

buy_strength._doc: All four conditions must hold. Drawdown is non-positive; -1.0 means 'no worse than -1%'.

sell_weakness_any_of._doc: Recent 2-week Sharpe turned negative — fast change-detector
Only one (or zero) of the last three buckets was positive

watch_forming._doc: Promotes a near-buy candidate to Watch (rather than Neutral) only when there is a Strong macro tailwind. Otherwise it stays Neutral.

neutral._doc: Default state when no rule fires. Includes funds with insufficient history (windows_total < 3) and conflicting signals.

rule_fired_taxonomy.sell_combined: Two or more sell triggers fired (most decisive Weakness)
rule_fired_taxonomy.neutral_conflicting: buy criteria met AND a sell trigger fired

data_quality_handling._doc: If sharpe_2w is NaN (e.g. producer's vol-guard fired on near-zero vol), treat as 0 for rule evaluation. Conviction scoring downstream penalizes via the data_quality flag.
